subcodes.first_line: O thou near handmaid of God! Thy letter was received and its meaning understood. It gave proof of thy steadfastness and constancy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز مقرب الهی نامه تو رسید و معانی معلوم گردید دلیل بر ثبوت و استقامت بر
subcodes.subjects: @demons and evil spirits, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @angels
